com._1c.v8.ibis.admin

Interface ISecurityProfileCOMClass

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    SecurityProfileCOMClass

    public interface ISecurityProfileCOMClass
    Interface of description of an allowed COM class of a security profile of 1C:Enterprise server cluster
